title: ochna affinis
intro: Ochna affinis, also known as the small-fruit Mussaenda, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which are derived from its leaves and stems. The medicinal properties of Ochna affinis are said to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the management of respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder for its herbal remedies.
